      have hUnion : Real.pi ∈ ⋃ i, s i := by
        refine mem_iUnion.2 ?_
        exact ⟨i, hi⟩
      simp [OuterMeasure.iUnion_nat, hs, hUnion, hsum]
    · have hUnion : ¬ Real.pi ∈ ⋃ i, s i := by
        intro hpi
        rcases mem_iUnion.1 hpi with ⟨i, hi⟩
        exact h ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hsi : ∀ i, ¬ Real.pi ∈ s i := by
        intro i hi
        exact h ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hsum : (∑' i : ℕ, (if Real.pi ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 0 := by
        have : (fun i : ℕ => (if Real.pi ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = fun _ => (0 : ℝ≥0∞) := by
          funext i
          simp [hsi i]
        simp [this]
      simp [OuterMeasure.iUnion_nat, hs, hUnion, hsum]

intro s hs
    by_cases h : π ∈ ⋃ i, s i
    · have : ∃ i, π ∈ s i := by
        simpa [iUnion_exists] using h
      rcases this with ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hsum : (∑' i : ℕ, (if π ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 1 := by
        have hdisj : ∀ j ≠ i, π ∉ s j := by
          intro j hij hπ
          have : Disjoint (s i) (s j) := hs (by exact hij)
          exact this.le_bot_iff.mp ⟨hi, hπ⟩
        have : (∑' j : ℕ, (if π ∈ s j then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0))
            = (if π ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) := by
              refine (tsum_eq_single i ?_).symm
              intro j hj
              have : π ∉ s j := hdisj j (by exact Ne.symm hj)
              simp [this]
        simpa [hi] using this
      simpa [OuterMeasure.measureOf] using (by
        have : (if π ∈ ⋃ i, s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) ≤ ∑' i : ℕ, (if π ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) := by
          simpa [h, hsum]
        exact this)
    · have : ∀ i, π ∉ s i := by
        intro i hi
        exact h (by
          refine mem_iUnion.2 ?_
          exact ⟨i, hi⟩)
      simp [OuterMeasure.measureOf, h, this]

intro s hs
    simpa using le_of_eq (by simp)

intro s hs
    simpa using le_of_eq (by
      classical
      by_cases h : (∃ i, (π : ℝ) ∈ s i)
      · rcases h with ⟨i, hi⟩
        have huniq : ∀ j, j ≠ i → (π : ℝ) ∉ s j := by
          intro j hj
          have : Disjoint (s i) (s j) := hs (by simpa [Function.onFun, hj] : i ≠ j)
          exact fun hj' => (this.le_bot_iff.mp (by
            refine le_trans ?_ (le_of_eq this.eq_bot)
            exact inter_subset_left)).elim (by exact ⟨hi, hj'⟩)
        have hmem : (π : ℝ) ∈ ⋃ j, s j := by
          exact mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨i, hi⟩
        have hsum : (∑' j : ℕ, (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s j then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 1 := by
          have : (∑' j : ℕ, (if j = i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 1 := by
            simpa using (tsum_ite_eq (a := (1 : ℝ≥0∞)) (i := i))
          have hrewrite :
              (fun j => (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s j then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) =
                (fun j => (if j = i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) := by
            funext j
            by_cases hji : j = i
            · subst hji
              simp [hi]
            · have : (π : ℝ) ∉ s j := huniq j (Ne.symm hji)
              simp [hji, this]
          simpa [hrewrite] using this
        have hunion : (if (π : ℝ) ∈ ⋃ j, s j then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) = 1 := by
          simp [hmem]
        simp [hunion, hsum]
      · have hnone : ∀ i, (π : ℝ) ∉ s i := by
          intro i hi
          exact h ⟨i, hi⟩
        have hunion : (π : ℝ) ∉ ⋃ i, s i := by
          intro hi
          rcases mem_iUnion.mp hi with ⟨i, hi⟩
          exact hnone i hi
        have hsum : (∑' i : ℕ, (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 0 := by
          have : (fun i => (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = fun _ : ℕ => (0 : ℝ≥0∞) := by
            funext i; simp [hnone i]
          simpa [this]
        simp [hunion, hsum])

intro s hs
    by_cases h : (∃ i, (Real.pi : ℝ) ∈ s i)
    · rcases h with ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hUnion : (Real.pi : ℝ) ∈ ⋃ i, s i := by
        refine mem_iUnion.2 ?_
        exact ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hsum : (∑' i : ℕ, (if (Real.pi : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 1 := by
        have huniq : ∀ j, j ≠ i → (Real.pi : ℝ) ∉ s j := by
          intro j hij
          intro hj
          have : Disjoint (s i) (s j) := hs (by simpa [Function.onFun] using hij)
          exact (this.le_bot_iff.mp) (by
            refine Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mp ?_
            refine ⟨Real.pi, hi, hj⟩)
        have : (∑' j : ℕ, (if (Real.pi : ℝ) ∈ s j then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) =
            (if (Real.pi : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) := by
          refine tsum_eq_single i ?_
          intro j hj
          have : (Real.pi : ℝ) ∉ s j := huniq j hj
          simp [this]
        simp [this, hi]
      simpa [measureOf, hUnion, hsum, le_rfl]
    · have hUnion : (Real.pi : ℝ) ∉ ⋃ i, s i := by
        intro hpi
        have : ∃ i, (Real.pi : ℝ) ∈ s i := by
          rcases mem_iUnion.1 hpi with ⟨i, hi⟩
          exact ⟨i, hi⟩
        exact h this
      have hsum : (∑' i : ℕ, (if (Real.pi : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 0 := by
        have : ∀ i, (Real.pi : ℝ) ∉ s i := by
          intro i hi
          exact h ⟨i, hi⟩
        simp [this]
      simpa [measureOf, hUnion, hsum]

intro s hs
    by_cases h : ∃ i, Real.pi ∈ s i
    · rcases h with ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hmem : Real.pi ∈ ⋃ j, s j := by
        refine mem_iUnion.mpr ?_
        exact ⟨i, hi⟩
      simp [μD, OuterMeasure.measureOf, hmem, hi]
    · have hmem : Real.pi ∉ ⋃ j, s j := by
        intro hpi
        rcases mem_iUnion.mp hpi with ⟨i, hi⟩
        exact h ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hnone : ∀ i, Real.pi ∉ s i := by
        intro i hi
        exact h ⟨i, hi⟩
      simp [μD, OuterMeasure.measureOf, hmem, hnone]

intro s hs
    by_cases h : (∃ i, (π : ℝ) ∈ s i)
    · rcases h with ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hmem : (π : ℝ) ∈ ⋃ i, s i := by
        exact mem_iUnion.2 ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hsum : (∑' i : ℕ, (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 1 := by
        have : (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) = 1 := by simpa [hi]
        have hzero : ∀ j ≠ i, (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s j then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) = 0 := by
          intro j hj
          have : (π : ℝ) ∉ s j := by
            intro hjmem
            have : Disjoint (s i) (s j) := hs (by simpa [Function.onFun, hj] using hj)
            exact this.le_bot ⟨hi, hjmem⟩
          simp [this]
        simpa [tsum_eq_single i, this, hzero]
      simpa [OuterMeasure.measureOf, hmem, hsum] using le_rfl
    · have hmem : (π : ℝ) ∉ ⋃ i, s i := by
        intro hmem
        rcases mem_iUnion.1 hmem with ⟨i, hi⟩
        exact h ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hsum : (∑' i : ℕ, (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 0 := by
        have : ∀ i, (π : ℝ) ∉ s i := by
          intro i hi
          exact h ⟨i, hi⟩
        simp [this]
      simpa [OuterMeasure.measureOf, hmem, hsum]

intro s hs
    by_cases h : (π : ℝ) ∈ ⋃ i, s i
    · have : ∃ i, (π : ℝ) ∈ s i := by
        simpa [mem_iUnion] using h
      rcases this with ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hsum : (∑' i : ℕ, (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 1 := by
        have huniq : ∀ j, j ≠ i → (π : ℝ) ∉ s j := by
          intro j hij
          have hdisj := hs hij
          have : Disjoint (s i) (s j) := hdisj
          exact fun hj => (this.le_bot_iff.mp ⟨hi, hj⟩)
        have : (∑' i : ℕ, (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) =
            (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) := by
          classical
          have : (∀ j ≠ i, (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s j then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) = 0) := by
            intro j hj
            by_cases hj' : (π : ℝ) ∈ s j
            · exfalso
              exact huniq j hj hj'
            · simp [hj']
          simpa [tsum_eq_single i, this]
        simpa [hi] using this
      simpa [OuterMeasure.measureOf, h, hsum]
    · have : ∀ i, (π : ℝ) ∉ s i := by
        intro i hi
        exact h (mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨i, hi⟩)
      have hsum : (∑' i : ℕ, (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 0 := by
        classical
        have : ∀ i, (if (π : ℝ) ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) = 0 := by
          intro i
          simp [this i]
        simpa [this]
      simpa [OuterMeasure.measureOf, h, hsum]

intro s hs
    by_cases hmem : (Real.pi ∈ ⋃ i, s i)
    · rcases mem_iUnion.mp hmem with ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hsi : Real.pi ∈ s i := hi
      have : (∑' i : ℕ, (if Real.pi ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) = 1 := by
        have hle : (∑' i : ℕ, (if Real.pi ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) ≤ 1 := by
          have hpair :
              Pairwise (fun i j =>
                Disjoint
                  ({x : ℝ | x = Real.pi ∧ Real.pi ∈ s i})
                  ({x : ℝ | x = Real.pi ∧ Real.pi ∈ s j})) := by
            intro i j hij
            refine Set.disjoint_left.2 ?_
            intro x hxi hxj
            rcases hxi with ⟨rfl, hpii⟩
            rcases hxj with ⟨rfl, hpij⟩
            have : Disjoint (s i) (s j) := hs hij
            exact (Set.disjoint_left.1 this) hpii hpij
          have hsum :
              (∑' i : ℕ, (if Real.pi ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0))
                = (∑' i : ℕ, (⟨{x : ℝ | x = Real.pi ∧ Real.pi ∈ s i}, by
                    intro x hx y hy
                    rcases hx with ⟨rfl, _⟩
                    rcases hy with ⟨rfl, _⟩
                    rfl⟩ : Setoid ℝ).classes) := by
                simp
          have : (∑' i : ℕ, (if Real.pi ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0))
              ≤ (1 : ℝ≥0∞) := by
            classical
            have hcount :
                {i : ℕ | Real.pi ∈ s i}.Subsingleton := by
              intro i hi j hj
              by_contra hij
              have : Disjoint (s i) (s j) := hs hij
              exact (Set.disjoint_left.1 this) hi hj
            have hfin : (Set.Finite {i : ℕ | Real.pi ∈ s i}) := Set.finite_singleton.subset (by
              classical
              rcases Set.subsingleton_iff_singleton.mp hcount with ⟨i0, hi0⟩
              refine ?_
              intro i hi
              simpa [hi0] using hi)
            rcases hfin.toFinset with ⟨t, ht⟩
            have ht' : {i : ℕ | Real.pi ∈ s i} ⊆ t := by
              intro i hi
              have : i ∈ ({i : ℕ | Real.pi ∈ s i}).toFinset := by
                simpa using hi
              simpa [Set.Finite.toFinset] using this
            have : (∑' i : ℕ, (if Real.pi ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0))
                = ∑ i in t, (if Real.pi ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0) := by
              classical
              refine (tsum_eq_sum ?_).symm
              refine (t.finite_toSet.subset ?_)
              intro i hi
              have : Real.pi ∈ s i := by
                by_contra hpi
                exact hi (by simp [hpi])
              exact False.elim (hi (by simpa using ht' this))
            simp [this, ENNReal.add_le_one_iff, Finset.sum_eq_single, hsi]
          exact this
        have hge : 1 ≤ (∑' i : ℕ, (if Real.pi ∈ s i then (1 : ℝ≥0∞) else 0)) := by
          refine le_trans ?_ (le_of_eq (by simp [hsi]))
          simp
        exact le_antisymm_iff.mp ⟨hle, hge⟩
      simpa [OuterMeasure.measureOf, hmem, this, hsi, ENNReal.one_le_tsum] 
    · simp [OuterMeasure.measureOf, hmem, hmem] at *

intro s hs
    by_cases h : (π ∈ ⋃ i, s i)
    · have : ∃ i, π ∈ s i := by
        simpa [mem_iUnion] using h
      rcases this with ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hpos : (measureOf (s i)) = 1 := by sorry
      have : (1 : ENNReal) ≤ ∑' i : ℕ, measureOf (s i) := by
        simpa [hpos] using (ENNReal.le_tsum (f := fun i : ℕ => measureOf (s i)) i)
      simpa [measureOf, h] using this
    · have : (measureOf (⋃ i, s i)) = 0 := by
        simp [measureOf, h]
      simp [this, zero_le]

intro s hs
    simpa using le_of_eq (by simp)

intro s hs
    by_cases h : (π ∈ ⋃ i, s i)
    · have : ∃ i, π ∈ s i := by
        simpa [mem_iUnion] using h
      rcases this with ⟨i, hi⟩
      have hsum : (1 : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ ∑' j : ℕ, (μD.measureOf (s j)) := by
        have : (1 : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ μD.measureOf (s i) := by
          simp [μD, hi]
        have : μD.measureOf (s i) ≤ ∑' j : ℕ, μD.measureOf (s j) :=
          le_tsum (fun j => μD.measureOf (s j)) i
        exact le_trans this this
      simpa [μD, h] using hsum
    · have : μD.measureOf (⋃ i, s i) = 0 := by
        simp [μD, h]
      have : (0 : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ ∑' i : ℕ, μD.measureOf (s i) := by
        exact bot_le
      simpa [this] using this
